lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission operate reliably. The exterior is well-maintained with only minor surface scratches. The interior shows light wear consistent with normal use.

Step into luxury with this exceptional find! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing and performing as if it just left the showroom. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, like-new interior. It’s a rare opportunity to own a car that truly looks and drives like a dream!

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several minor dings. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining on the seats. All major mechanical systems are functional.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently requires significant mechanical repairs, including engine work and a new transmission, to be safely driven. The exterior shows heavy wear with visible rust on the body panels and several prominent dents. The interior is also in rough shape with torn seats and non-functional climate control. This car is ideal for someone looking for a major project or a source for parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires significant mechanical and cosmetic work to be safely roadworthy. The exterior displays extensive paint damage, deep scratches, and multiple dents on several body panels. Mechanically, the engine runs but exhibits a rough idle and there are visible fluid leaks that need urgent attention. The interior shows heavy wear and tear, including ripped upholstery and several non-functional dashboard components. This car is best suited for someone looking for a major project or a source of spare parts.

We are pleased to offer this superlative example, preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits absolute aesthetic and mechanical integrity, reflecting a standard of care that is increasingly rare. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a vehicle of uncompromising quality and prestige.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. You really have to see it in person to appreciate how spotless it is. It's perfect for someone who wants that brand-new feel without the brand-new price tag. Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Offered is a specimen-grade E92 M3, meticulously maintained to preserve its mechanical integrity and aesthetic purity. Powered by the
Pristine condition. Single owner. Low mileage. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece of preservation, offered in showroom condition that must be seen to be believed. The exterior paint remains in a flawless, mirror-like state, devoid of any stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes, highlighting its history as a strictly garage-kept treasure. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine luxury; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear or creasing, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians using OEM parts. It has never been driven in inclement weather, ensuring the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a piece of automotive excellence that presents exactly as it did on the day of its original delivery.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic imperfections and a flawless mechanical profile. A rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and provenance.

Presented in impeccable, showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously maintained and preserved with an exacting eye for detail, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? You’ve found it! This absolute gem has been my pride and joy, and it’s in truly flawless condition. It’s been pampered every single day and looks stunning from every angle. I’m honestly sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love the second they get behind the wheel. Come check it out—you won't be disappointed!
Offered in concours-level condition, this performance icon features a high-revving, naturally aspirated power plant with a 12.5:1 compression
Pristine condition. Garaged since purchase. No accidents. Full service records included. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously garaged and pampered since day one. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather seats show zero signs of wear, and the original protective films are still present on several interior components. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a complete, documented service history from the local dealership. Every button, dial, and feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. It drives with the tightness and precision of a brand-new vehicle. Included are both original keys, all owner’s manuals, and the original window sticker. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning buyer to own a vehicle that has been maintained to the highest possible standards.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior and mechanical components, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. An acquisition of this caliber is rare, offering the discerning driver an unparalleled experience of quality and long-term value.

We are pleased to present this superlative motorcar, maintained to an uncompromising standard and presented in showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish paired with an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical system has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering an ownership experience indistinguishable from new. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine specimen of automotive excellence.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe the condition of this beauty—it's practically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that's been babied and looks absolutely stunning, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Available for the discerning collector is an impeccable E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six. This unit boasts a flawlessly calibrated double VANOS system and individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag six-speed manual transmission offers crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Chassis integrity is paramount; the rear subframe has been meticulously inspected and reinforced to ensure structural rigidity. Suspension geometry is maintained via fresh bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers, while the braking system retains optimal bite with zero rotor glazing. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the paint depth remains consistent across all panels with no evidence of oxidation. This is a turn-key example with a documented service history, free of any mechanical parasitic loss or fluid seepage.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records complete. Flawless paint and interior.

Offering a truly showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously preserved and garage-kept since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains soft and matte, the original floor mats are spotless, and there is absolutely no visible wear on the touchpoints or bolsters. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history documented exclusively through authorized specialists. Every electronic feature functions exactly as intended, the engine bay is detailed to a concours standard, and the pristine alloy wheels are wrapped in high-performance tires with significant tread remaining. This is an exceptional, turn-key example for a discerning buyer who demands a vehicle in its finest possible state.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained in an impeccable state that mirrors its original delivery condition. Every facet of this automobile, from its flawless exterior finish to its precisely calibrated mechanical systems, adheres to a standard of excellence seldom encountered in the pre-owned market. This is a definitive acquisition for the individual who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic purity.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior. Mechanically superior and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. This is not merely a pre-owned vehicle; it is a benchmark of quality.

Hey there! You have to check out this absolute gem! It’s in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, so it’s completely spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Offering an exceptional E46 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. This specimen features the S54 inline-six power unit, exhibiting perfect compression across all cylinders and a meticulously serviced VANOS system to ensure precise valve timing. The high-revving 3.2L engine is mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission, delivering power through a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is uncompromising, with a reinforced rear subframe and a suspension setup that retains its original geometry and damping characteristics. Every component, from the individual throttle bodies to the stainless steel exhaust manifold, remains in concours-level condition. This is a turn-key, collector-grade vehicle for those who demand mechanical purity and communicative handling dynamics.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and pampered since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, original luster with zero swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, while the factory wheels are completely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear, and that distinctive 'new car' scent still lingers. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. All service records are organized and available for review. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade vehicle for the discerning buyer who demands perfection. Includes both original keys, all owner's manuals, and a clean title in hand.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a commitment to uncompromising automotive excellence. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.
